_mode_comment: paper = simulated fills in local ledger. live = route orders to the configured broker (see broker section).

broker.name: trading212
broker._guardrails: t212_environment demo|live. live_orders_enabled MUST be true to send real orders (default false = dry-run, logs intended orders only). Trading 212's API cannot access cards/deposits/withdrawals. Whole shares only. Every order checked against max_order_value_usd. Set t212_api_key in data/secrets.json or the T212_API_KEY secret.

buying._sizing_note: $100k test scale, wide book (many small whole-share trades). Before live: set max_position_usd back to ~45 to match the real £100/month account.

earnings._note: Earnings within avoid_earnings_days (2) = hard veto (too close to hold through). Earnings 3-15 days out + positive momentum/news = catalyst bonus. Positions are force-sold 1 day before earnings to avoid the binary event.
